positive: A minimal, geometric depiction of a stylized celestial body, such as a crescent moon and abstract constellations, rendered in a clean linework style. The composition should feature strong negative space, emphasizing the silhouette of the moon and interconnected starlight paths. Use a monochromatic palette with deep indigo, pale gold, and stark white. The lines must be crisp and highly visible against a solid background, ensuring print contrast. Focus on symmetry and abstract depth, suitable for high-quality apparel printing. Mid-century modern astronomical poster aesthetic, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, signature, logo, text, noise, smudges, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealism, messy, clutter
